price.purpose: Listing prices on detail pages and review summaries. The heaviest element on screen — reserved exclusively for numbers that drive purchase decisions.

display.purpose: Page-level headings: 'Mis anuncios', dashboard h1, modal titles.

body.purpose: Listing descriptions, seller bios, message text. Max 65ch line length on prose.

label.purpose: Timestamps, condition text in cards, secondary metadata. No uppercase.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Product cards at rest. Very subtle lift.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Product cards on hover. Widens as the card lifts with translateY(-3px).

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modals and floating panels anchored above the dimmed backdrop.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and state transitions. Decelerates quickly.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Movement within the screen. Used for gallery crossfade and in-place transitions.

motion.name: duration-micro
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes on buttons and links.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard UI transitions: image crossfade, card hover lift, button active scale.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main transactional CTA. Full-width in sidebars and forms, auto-width inline.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; min-height: 52px; padding: 16px 24px; background: #09090B; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Offer Button
components.description: Orange CTA for offer actions. Used on listing detail and in OfferCard seller actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-offer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 24px; background: #FF6B2B; color: #fff; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-offer:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-offer:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-offer:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Border outline, muted text. Never for primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 24px; background: transparent; color: #737373; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; border-radius: 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FAFAFA; color: #404040; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Listing card in the marketplace grid. Price-first hierarchy.
components.html:
89,00 €

Pantalla OLED iPhone 14 Pro — original

Nuevo
vendedor_madridhace 2h
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; background: #fff; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.12), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08); } .ds-product-card__image { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; background: #F5F5F5; } .ds-product-card__image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__image img { transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-product-card__content { padding: 12px 14px; } .ds-product-card__price { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; font-weight: 700; color: #000; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0; } .ds-product-card__title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #404040; line-height: 1.4; margin: 2px 0 8px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-product-card__meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; } .ds-product-card__footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; gap: 8px; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #A3A3A3; } .ds-condition-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-condition-badge--nuevo { background: #ECFDF5; color: #059669; } .ds-condition-badge--como_nuevo { background: #EFF6FF; color: #2563EB; } .ds-condition-badge--bueno { background: #FFFBEB; color: #D97706; } .ds-condition-badge--aceptable { background: #F4F4F5; color: #71717A; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Border-only, no fill.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #111111; } .ds-input { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #111111; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #A3A3A3; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #111111; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Offer Card — Pending
components.description: Offer card in the chat stream. Centered, max-width 320px, state-colored.
components.html:
Nueva oferta

89,00 €

hace 5 min
components.css: .ds-offer-card { width: 100%; max-width: 320px; border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .ds-offer-card--pending { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #EEEEEE; } .ds-offer-card--accepted { background: #F0FFF4; border: 1px solid #86EFAC; } .ds-offer-card--rejected { background: #F5F5F5; border: 1px solid #E5E5E5; } .ds-offer-card--countered { background: #FFF5F0; border: 1px solid #FED7AA; } .ds-offer-card__title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111111; margin: 0; } .ds-offer-card__amount { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 900; color: #09090B; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 8px 0 4px; } .ds-offer-card__time { font-size: 0.6875rem; color: #A3A3A3; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-offer-card__actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .ds-offer-card__btn { flex: 1; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-offer-card__btn--accept { background: #09090B; color: #fff; border: none; } .ds-offer-card__btn--reject { background: transparent; color: #111111; border: 1px solid #111111; } .ds-offer-card__btn:hover { opacity: 0.8; }

components.name: Condition Badge
components.description: Inline badge for listing condition. Color-coded by condition slug.
components.html: NuevoComo nuevoBuenoAceptable
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge--nuevo { background: #ECFDF5; color: #059669; } .ds-badge--como_nuevo { background: #EFF6FF; color: #2563EB; } .ds-badge--bueno { background: #FFFBEB; color: #D97706; } .ds-badge--aceptable { background: #F4F4F5; color: #71717A; }

narrative.overview:
Fixter's visual system is the glass counter at a specialist repair shop — where a knowledgeable technician scans parts quickly, trusts what they see, and makes confident decisions without friction. The interface is lean and credible: nothing decorative that doesn't earn its space, everything visible that the buyer needs to decide.

The palette is restrained on purpose. White surfaces, near-black type, and a single orange accent that appears where action is required. This is not a marketplace that shouts. It earns trust through consistent precision: condition badges that mean something, prices that are the largest element on the page, and seller ratings that appear without being hunted for.

This system explicitly rejects: AliExpress crowded layouts, SaaS glassmorphism and startup-pitch copy, Milanuncios functional-but-dusty classifieds, and Amazon/MediaMarkt corporate coldness. It should feel like it was built by and for people who actually repair iPhones.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color: one orange accent, near-black type, white surfaces, subtle gray hierarchy
Price dominance: the listing price is always the visual protagonist of the sidebar
Trust-first layout: condition badges, review scores, and seller stats appear near the primary action
Mobile-native: full-width CTA buttons, thumb-reachable tap targets, density on desktop
No decoration: motion only for state feedback, shadows only on hover or interactive lift
No emoji anywhere in the UI — SVG icons only

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The orange accent appears at most in one dominant interactive element per visible viewport area. Its rarity signals priority.

rules.name: The Semantic Green Rule
rules.body: Green (#16A34A) is reserved for accepted/confirmed states. Never use for general success messages or decorative emphasis.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section labels use font-semibold text-sm text-zinc-700. Never uppercase tracking-wide/widest text-zinc-400.

rules.name: The Price Protagonist Rule
rules.body: The price on a listing detail is always text-5xl font-black tracking-tight. No other text matches this size.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A resting element has either a border OR a very subtle shadow (2px blur max). Never both.

rules.name: The Responsive Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows change with state. shadow-card at rest → shadow-hover on hover.

rules.name: The One Button Rule
rules.body: Each card or modal has one primary action. Secondary actions are ghost buttons. Never two filled buttons side by side.

dos: Do use font-black (900) for prices and only for prices.
Do use text-sm font-semibold text-zinc-700 for section labels. Never uppercase or tracking-wide.
Do use the orange accent for exactly one dominant interactive element per visible area.
Do use text-rose-700 on bg-rose-50 for error messages on colored backgrounds.
Do use SVG icons for all affordances — no emoji substitutes.
Do show condition badges, review scores, and seller metadata near the primary action button.
Do use active:scale-[0.97] on all actionable buttons for tactile feedback.
donts: Don't use AliExpress-style crowded layouts: price banners over images, multi-colored badge clusters.
Don't use SaaS-startup patterns: glassmorphism, gradient text, hero metrics, startup-pitch copy.
Don't let condition badges and review scores feel like afterthoughts.
Don't make Fixter feel like Amazon or MediaMarkt: corporate, cold, warehouse-transactional.
Don't use uppercase + tracking-wide on section labels or recurring text elements.
Don't use emoji anywhere in the UI.
Don't pair a colored border with a large box shadow (blur ≥ 16px) on the same element.
Don't use border-radius above 24px on product cards or form sections.
Don't use transition-all — always name the specific animated properties.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Solid colors only.
